title: PMLA Tribunal: Share Investment Not ‘Proceeds of Crime’; Attachment Limited to Mining Profits
description:
PMLA Tribunal held share investment not proceeds of crime and limited attachment only to mining profits. Productive assets of the company may be released if equivalent security such as bank guarantee or FDR is furnished.
The post PMLA Tribunal: Share Investment Not ‘Proceeds of Crime’; Attachment Limited to Mining Profits appeared first on TaxGuru.
